Twin Vision Productions

The Story

Creator. Writer.
Producer. Actor.

On January 15th, 2026, Aria and Kai Underwood were born. And with them, the name Twin Vision finally meant exactly what it was always supposed to mean.

Rashod Underwood is a Baltimore native, Sacred Heart University business graduate, and former collegiate football and lacrosse athlete who relocated to Los Angeles to pursue a passion he couldn't yet name. Mentored over 13 years by veteran comedian Reggie Carroll — writer for Katt Williams, Showtime at the Apollo, BET's Comic View — Rashod learned the craft from someone who carried the respect of comedians, Hollywood stars, and athletes across the industry.

Comedy has always been Rashod's strongest instinct — but the creative range runs deep. On his debut project Rent & Go, he didn't just write and produce. He stepped in front of the camera too, bringing his characters to life with the same hands-on commitment he brings to every part of his work. The proof-of-concept trailer is the foundation this entire slate is built on.

"Everyone has a vision — something they can't yet see but believe. The twins are my fuel. In time, we will get there."

✦

The Long Game

Where This Is Going.

Twin Vision Productions is built for more than a single slate. The goal is a lasting presence in the entertainment industry — writing, creating, and producing across every format the industry touches.

📺

Premium TV & Streaming

Developing original series for Netflix, HBO, Hulu, FX, BET+, and Peacock. Character-driven, culturally specific, commercially scalable — built for platforms that define prestige television today.

🎬

Film & Larger Productions

Expanding into feature film with Stripped targeting Blumhouse and A24. The long-term vision includes writing for major studio projects and building a production infrastructure for bigger stories.

✍️

Brands, Commercials & Beyond

A creative writing style built on comedy, authenticity, and cultural fluency translates directly to branded content. Open to collaborations with companies looking for writing that genuinely connects.

The Slate — 18 Properties

Every Project. Fully Developed.

#01LEAD PROJECT
RENT & GO

Comedy · Mockumentary · 22-24 Min

When a reluctant aspiring model is forced to run his injured father's struggling rental car company in South L.A., he must modernize a dysfunctional team, fend off a street-level fraud operation siphoning their fleet, and prove himself to the neighborhood — all while refusing to admit this place might actually be home.

COMPS The Office · Abbott Elementary
PLATFORMS Hulu · BET+ · Peacock · Amazon
▶ Watch Trailer
#02FEATURE FILM
STRIPPED

Horror · Dark Comedy · ~90 Min Feature

When five college students attend a Halloween ABC Party, one who skipped the spiked welcome punch discovers the host house is haunted by seven founding members of an underground arts collective — each with an unfinished score to settle.

COMPS Get Out · Hereditary · Bodies Bodies Bodies
PLATFORMS Blumhouse · A24 · Netflix · Universal
#03
THE TOUR GUIDE

Thriller · Dark Comedy · 45-55 Min Anthology

A beloved tour-bus driver is the charming face of an international criminal network preying on tourists — until one woman refuses to become another victim. Season 1: Jamaica. Season 2: Morocco. Season 3: Thailand.

COMPS The Undoing · Dirty John · Bad Sisters
PLATFORMS Netflix · HBO · Apple TV+
#04
HYPOCRITE

Dark Comedy · 30-45 Min Series

A world-famous relationship coach whose wife just filed for divorce must keep his crumbling private life secret while coaching an NFL star, a family-values senator with four estranged kids, and a newlywed couple whose marriage looks exactly like his own.

COMPS Succession · Abbott Elementary · Fleabag
PLATFORMS Netflix · HBO · FX
#05
TWIN VENTURES

Comedy · Mockumentary · 30 Min

Two broke, overly confident best friends navigate bad pitches, worse decisions, and the specific chaos of trying to build something real in Inglewood — one catastrophic startup meeting at a time.

COMPS Shark Tank (tone) · Atlanta · Insecure
PLATFORMS Netflix · Hulu · Amazon · Disney+
#06
WHAT WE NEVER SAID

Drama · Dark Comedy · Prestige · 60 Min

When the Harmon family gathers for Christmas, a relationship coach son discovers the secret he's been protecting for seven years isn't the one he thought — and the lie everyone's been keeping is thirty years older than he knew. Told across two parallel timelines.

COMPS This Is Us · Succession · The Bear
PLATFORMS Netflix · HBO · Hulu · Prime Video
#07ANIMATION
SOMEBODY ELSE'S KIDS

Adult Animation · Family Comedy · 22 Min

A veteran foster parent navigating the gap between what the system promises and what it delivers — told in a groundbreaking dual animation style that shifts between the children's magical inner world and the harsh reality adults see.

COMPS Big Mouth · The Simpsons · Bluey (tone)
PLATFORMS Netflix · Hulu · Adult Swim
#08
A CHRISTMAS BANGER

Dark Comedy · HBCU Setting · 30 Min

Three HBCU best friends throw a low-key Christmas birthday banger in Atlanta. One uninvited guest. One loaded situationship. One gun aimed at the wrong people. Low-key was always a lie.

COMPS Atlanta · Insecure · Fargo (tone)
PLATFORMS Netflix · HBO Max · FX · BET+
#09
A MOMENT TOO LATE

Dark Comedy · Dramedy · Feature or Pilot

When a tight-knit circle of Black professionals each face the catastrophic consequences of their greatest act of procrastination, they're forced to reckon with time itself — and the terrifying question: is it too late?

COMPS Atlanta · Fleabag · Sorry to Bother You
PLATFORMS Netflix · HBO · Hulu · Peacock
#10ANIMATION
COCKY BROWN

Adult Animation · Baltimore Setting · 22 Min

A 38-year-old Baltimore man launches his rap career, runs a label out of a barbershop, beefs with rivals on live TV, tries to sign a viral white girl rapper named Cream Puff, and somehow keeps his family together — all while refusing to admit he peaked fifteen years ago.

COMPS The Boondocks · Atlanta · Dave
PLATFORMS Adult Swim · Comedy Central · Max
#11
SIDE OUT

Comedy · Single Camera · 30 Min

A broke-but-proud Hispanic dad, his childless hype-man brother-in-law, and his fiercely competitive wife blow their savings every weekend on the AAU volleyball circuit — chasing their daughters' dreams while navigating the most intense, most overlooked sports world in America.

COMPS Abbott Elementary · Friday Night Lights · Schitt's Creek
PLATFORMS Netflix · HBO Max · ABC · Peacock
#12
RACE OF FRIENDS

Comedy · Ensemble · 30 Min

Four strangers answer the same Craigslist ad at 3 AM and end up building the family they didn't know they needed — one roommate dispute, boundary violation, and accidental intervention at a time.

COMPS Insecure · Atlanta · New Girl
PLATFORMS HBO · FX · Netflix · FOX
#13
GATE CRASHERS

Comedy · Scripted Mockumentary · 30 Min

Inside Meridian Group — a mid-size company solicited by every vendor, rep, and hustler in America — a 15-year veteran gatekeeper and a bewildered new hire try to hold the line against the most creative, desperate, and occasionally brilliant people in every industry.

COMPS Abbott Elementary · Curb Your Enthusiasm · WWDITS
PLATFORMS Peacock · FX · Netflix · Max
#14
PAWS & CLAUSE

Comedy · Single-Camera Mockumentary · 30 Min

Three competing nonprofits in the emotional support animal certification space — a beloved 30-year institution, a VC-funded startup 45 days old, and the animals themselves — collide over a city contract only one can win.

COMPS The Office · Succession · Abbott Elementary
PLATFORMS Peacock · NBC · Netflix · Hulu
#15
ROLLING PLATES

Scripted Dramedy · Road Show · 30 Min

A burned-out married couple quits everything, sells their house, buys an RV, and drags their adult kids across America as amateur food bloggers — chasing one perfect plate at a time, and running from everything they left behind.

COMPS The Bear · Chef's Table · Modern Family
PLATFORMS Netflix · Hulu · BET+ · Prime
#16
PLEASE HOLD

Comedy · Ensemble · Call Center · 30 Min

At Apex Solutions — a chaotic, underfunded call center where every department handles something wildly different — a crew of over-it workers, office lovers, lunch thieves, and phone warriors try to survive the worst job in America without losing each other.

COMPS The Office · Workaholics · Abbott Elementary
PLATFORMS Netflix · Peacock · FX · HBO Max
#17
THE CHRISTMAS WISH LIST

Dramedy · Social Thriller · 30 Min Series

A Black millennial brand ambassador navigates ambition and Instagram performance anxiety — until a mysterious online admirer starts delivering everything on her Christmas list, and a catfish slowly closes in.

COMPS Insecure · You · Catfish
PLATFORMS BET+ · Peacock · Netflix · OWN
#18
THE BLOCK

Comedy · Single Camera · 30 Min

A 30-year-old high school gym teacher tries to keep his rebellious teenage sister off the internet and out of trouble — while working in the same school she attends. The problem: she's funnier, more popular, and far more internet-famous than he'll ever be.

COMPS Abbott Elementary · Bernie Mac Show · Grown-ish
PLATFORMS Hulu · Peacock · BET+ · Max
